_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in A1/003 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Tom; computer plays Anna. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 003 · The Lost Cat

routes.meaning: Tom reacts and asks what happened.
examples: Oh no! What happened to her?
Oh no! Tell me what happened.

routes.meaning: Tom asks if Anna is okay.
examples: Oh no! That is so sad.

partial.message: React to Anna: “Oh no! What happened?”

off_topic.message: Anna lost her cat. Say “Oh no! What happened?”

npc.text: I'm a little sad. Let me tell you what happened.

off_topic.message: Anna wants to tell you. Ask “What happened?”

npc.text: She ran out of the house.

routes.meaning: Tom asks if Anna looked for the cat.
examples: Did you look for the cat?
Did you go look for her?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Did you look for her?”

routes.meaning: Tom asks where the cat went.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Did you look for her?”

partial.message: Ask Anna: “Did you look for her?”

off_topic.message: The cat ran out. Ask “Did you look for her?”

npc.text: I didn't know! So I looked for her everywhere.

routes.meaning: Tom asks if Anna looked everywhere or found her.

off_topic.message: Anna looked for her cat. Ask “Did you look everywhere?”

routes.meaning: Tom asks where Anna found the cat.
examples: Where did you find the cat?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Where did you find her?”

routes.meaning: Tom asks if Anna found the cat.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Where did you find her?”

partial.message: Ask Anna: “Where did you find her?”

off_topic.message: Anna looked everywhere. Ask “Where did you find her?”

npc.text: I found her under a tree.

routes.meaning: Tom asks if the cat was okay.
Tom feels sorry for the cat.

off_topic.message: Anna found the cat under a tree. Ask “Was she okay?”

npc.text: Yes, she was hungry but happy.

routes.meaning: Tom says he is glad Anna found her cat.
examples: I am glad you found her!
I am so happy you found her!
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I am glad you found her!”

routes.meaning: Tom asks if Anna fed the cat.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I am glad you found her!”

partial.message: Tell Anna: “I am glad you found her!”

off_topic.message: The cat is safe now. Say “I am glad you found her!”

npc.text: Yes! I gave her some food. Now she is happy.

routes.meaning: Tom says he is glad Anna found her cat.
examples: I am glad you found her!
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I am glad you found her!”

partial.message: Tell Anna: “I am glad you found her!”

off_topic.message: The cat is happy now. Say “I am glad you found her!”

npc.text: Thank you, Tom! You are a good friend.
